text: Hello, what problem are you having today?
I have had a headache for the past 3 days and I feel slightly feverish.
Do you have any vomiting or dizziness?
No vomiting but I feel a little tired.
Your temperature is 99 degrees Fahrenheit and your pulse is 90.
It looks like a mild viral infection.
I will prescribe paracetamol 650 mg to ice a day for 3 days.
Please drink plenty of fluids and take rest.
